title: Senior Software Engineer - Nature's Basket - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Nature's Basket - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Nature's Basket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Nature's Basket:
Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket!
